name: PARAKITA Dental Health
credibility_policy: Every medical claim must cite a chunk with credibility >= 3. Guidelines & systematic reviews (credibility 5) are preferred over primary studies. Average corpus credibility per run must be >= 3.
description: Original FACTOR workspace, evolved from the KLINIK PARAKITA CMS article module. Writes in Indonesian, then transcreates to English. Content type: health articles for the public, strictly grounded in curated dental journals.

name: DevOps Tutorials
credibility_policy: Tutorial steps must be validated against official documentation with version pinning. Docs (credibility 5) and maintainer sources outrank blog posts. No step ships without a matching docs chunk.
description: Demonstrates FACTOR's topic-agnostic, multi-workspace design. English-only tutorials grounded in official product documentation, showing the 'tutorial' genre where every step is version-pinned to a docs source.
